name: NextMeeting
author: Tyler Barnett
description: Shows your next Meet/Zoom event in the Omarchy bar with a full-day agenda popup.

barWidget.description: Shows your next video meeting, opens a full-day agenda panel, and joins Meet/Zoom links.

schema.label: Auto-fetch interval (seconds)
schema.description: How often NextMeeting checks gcalcli for calendar changes. Middle-click the widget to refresh manually.

schema.label: Schedule clear text
schema.description: Text shown when there are no more joinable video meetings today.

schema.label: Lookahead window (days)
schema.description: How many days ahead NextMeeting should ask gcalcli for agenda data.

schema.label: Maximum bar display characters
schema.description: Maximum length of the bar label before it is truncated with ellipsis.

schema.label: Meeting open mode
schema.description: How NextMeeting opens join links. Use the default browser or a custom command.

schema.label: Custom open command
schema.description: Used only when Meeting open mode is custom-command. The join URL is available as $NEXT_MEETING_URL and $MEETING_URL.

schema.label: Calendars
schema.description: Calendars to consider. Leave empty to use every calendar on the account.
schema.emptyText: No calendars found. Run 'gcalcli list' in a terminal.
